name: Worlds Greatest Cookie
recipeInstructions: This recipe was a first place winner for youth category at the Del Mar county fair, 1993. The two girls won ribbons in several events. Cream butter and peanut butter together; gradually add both sugars and cream until well blended. Sift flour and baking soda together; add to creamed mixture. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop spoonfuls of cookie dough onto a greased baking sheet. Flatten slightly with the back of a spoon. Bake in preheated 325 degree oven for 15 minutes.
